text: How would you describe your spending style?

options.label: I'm pretty careful with money, every rupee counts
I budget mindfully but don't stress over small things
I spend when it feels right, save when I can

options.label: Exact split always, I'll send you a spreadsheet

What's mine is yours, mi casa es su casa
